---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/picofme.jpg"
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/josh-writes/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:jj.silalahi21@gmail.com"  
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# Hi. I'm Josh. Welcome to my website!

I work in the Animal Resource Center at Case Western Reserve University as an Animal Husbandry Technician. I take care of a few of their mouse rooms, which hold dorms housing thousands of research mice used by multiple laboratories at the university. I work diligently to ensure that my animals are cared for compassionately, and watched over carefully. Thanks to the university tuition benefit that is afforded to full-time employees, I also study as a part-time Epidemiology and Biostatistics Master's student at Case. 

I was an English major as an undergraduate at Boston College but I have been interested in scientific research since graduating in 2022. I worked for almost two years assisting a data management team lead at a contract research organization called IQVIA, where I was exposed to Biostatistics and developed a curiosity for the field that led me here.

Rock climbing, competitive gaming, and guitar-playing are my main joys in life. I could talk to anyone all day about them.

If you'd like to reach out to me, feel free to contact my email at jj.silalahi21@gmail.com, or connect with me at https://www.linkedin.com/in/josh-writes/
